case_number: Criminal Revision Application No. S-03 of 2021

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Revision Application No. S-03 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections For hearing of main case 08.03.2021. Mr. Muneer Ahmed Turk, advocate for applicant. Mr. Roshan Azeem Mallah, advocate for complainant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G for the State. ==== Learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Badin while deciding bail application No.1631 of 2020 ordered for keeping Mst. Parveen in Dar-ul-Aman, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of instant Revision Application. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that Mst. Parveen has been kept in custody by learned trial Judge without her consent; therefore, the impugned order to her extent being illegal is liable to be set-aside. In support of his contention he relied upon case of Muhammad Khalid vs Magistrate Ist Class and 2 others (PLD 2021 Lahore 21). Learned A.P.G for the State did not support the impugned order to the extent of keeping Mst. Parveen in custody however, learned counsel for the complainant sought for dismissal of the instant Revision Application by contending that the release of Mst. Parveen would be having dire-consequences. I have considered the above argument and perused the record. Apparently, Mst. Parveen has been ordered to be kept in Dar-ul-Aman by learned trial Judge without her consent; therefore, the impugned order to the extent of her confinement in Dar-ul-Aman is set-aside with direction to learned trial Judge to call the police report, if necessary, record statement of Mst. Parveen and then to pass fresh order for her custody or otherwise in accordance with law, expeditiously.

Parveen has been ordered to be kept in Dar-ul-Aman by learned trial Judge without her consent; therefore, the impugned order to the extent of her confinement in Dar-ul-Aman is set-aside with direction to learned trial Judge to call the police report, if necessary, record statement of Mst. Parveen and then to pass fresh order for her custody or otherwise in accordance with law, expeditiously. Instant Criminal Revision Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
